planned_tool_calls: obsidian-cli/search: 搜索笔记《Agent 上下文管理》定位候选
obsidian-cli/read: 读取选定笔记完整内容
progressive-summarization: 读取 module-progressive-summarization.md，对笔记执行 L1+L2 提炼（L1 保留约10%原文片段，L2 加粗关键句不超过 L1 的20%）
obsidian-cli/edit: 更新笔记，写入 distilled_excerpt 与 core_points，设置 status=distilled, distill_level=L2
evidence: target_path is not null and is not the vault root
